# ~~getSessionId()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function getSessionId(headers: IncomingHttpHeaders): string | undefined;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts:85](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/reflect.utility.ts#L85)

Extracts the `Mcp-Session-Id` header from incoming HTTP headers.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type                                             | Description                                                          |
| --------- | ------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `headers` | [`IncomingHttpHeaders`](https://nodejs.org/api/) | The [IncomingHttpHeaders](https://nodejs.org/api/) from the request. |

## Returns

`string` | `undefined`

The session ID string, or `undefined` if the header is
absent.

## Deprecated

Superseded by the non-exported `getSessionId` helper
in `http-transport.ts`, which operates on the full
`IncomingMessage` instead of raw headers.  Will be removed
in a future cleanup pass.

## Remarks

Handles both single-value and array-value header forms.  When the
header is an array (multiple values), returns the first element.
